changes_made: Removed 'k8s_audit_logging_enabled' as it is too generic and does not specifically address privileged function logging.
review_notes: The control AC-6(9) is applicable to Kubernetes as it involves logging privileged function usage, which can be managed through Kubernetes audit logging. The function 'k8s_audit_privileged_function_logging_enabled' is appropriately named to reflect this specific requirement. The function 'k8s_rbac_least_privilege_enforcement' is also relevant as it ensures least privilege principles are enforced. However, 'k8s_audit_logging_enabled' was removed because it is too broad and does not specifically address the logging of privileged functions.
title: Least Privilege - Least privilege | log use of privileged functions log the execution of privilege
step1_reasoning: The control AC-6(9) focuses on logging the use of privileged functions, which can be mapped to Kubernetes audit logging capabilities. Kubernetes audit logs can be configured to capture the execution of privileged functions. Additionally, enforcing least privilege through RBAC ensures that only necessary privileges are granted, reducing the risk of unauthorized privileged actions.
